bead.title: FEAT-008 P8: US-097 personas cards + bind flow (REWRITE existing page)
bead.description: This is a REWRITE of existing personas/+page.svelte — today uses <button> rows, tests expect <article> cards. Add Persona fields body/source/bindings to schema; keep existing roles/description; alias or rename existing content→body. Personas query returns flat array data.personas (NOT PersonaConnection.edges). Card click → /personas/[name] detail route; detail reads from list query (tests don't mock persona(name) separately). Bind form uses native <select> for role + project. Read projectBindings before opening; if role already bound, warn and require confirm. Success renders <div role=status> with 'bound' or 'saved'. Commit light+dark screenshot baselines.
